title: Ubiquiti UVC-G5-PTZ - UniFi Protect outdoor 4MP PTZ camera, black
description: Compact, all-weather camera with ultra-low latency pan-tilt-zoom control and versatile mounting options The camera has 2K resolution for nice picture. It has two times optical zoom too. IR night vision is used to up to 20 meters otherwise integrated LED spotlight for color night vision is used. It supports AI event detections and automatic person tracking. It has anti vandal IK04 protection . The camera is also weatherproof with IP66 certification 2K (4MP) video resolution 2x optical zoom 20 m (65 ft) IR night vision AI event detections and automatic person tracking Record audio with an integrated microphone Integrated LED spotlight for color night vision Connect and power using PoE+ Weatherproof (outdoor exposed) IP66 + IK04 protection Angle of view: 99.7-45.5° horizontally, 51.9-25.4° vertically, 121-52.4° diagonally The package does not contain PoE injector Device Mounting accessories
